properties.headline: TEST FIXTURE Tornado Warning until 7:00PM CDT (reaped-whirlwind --test-email)
properties.description: TEST FIXTURE — do not act. This is the canned NWS-shaped record reaped-whirlwind's alert_service uses to exercise the email pipeline without waiting for a real warning. A confirmed tornado was located near downtown Fort Worth, moving east at 30 mph.
properties.instruction: TEST FIXTURE — do not act. (Real NWS instruction would say: TAKE COVER NOW! Move to a basement or an interior room on the lowest floor of a sturdy building. Avoid windows.)
